auth.signin_hint: CLOUDER uses your Spotify Premium account.
auth.premium_body: Upgrade your Spotify account and try again.
auth.oauth_failed_body: Spotify could not complete authentication. Please retry.
auth.missing_params: Authentication response is missing code or state.

empty_state.coming_soon_body: This screen lands in a follow-up ticket.

errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side.
errors.network: Connection lost. Check your network and retry.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this.

long_op.very_long: This is taking longer than usual. If nothing happens, refresh — the operation may have already succeeded.

router.not_found_body: The page you tried to open does not exist.
